calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Judith Baer for Petitioner.

Ms. Baer stated that she submitted a declaration on Friday, that all of the bills have been paid, that there is no cash in the estate, that her Client does not do well with money so the Client asked if she could deposit the money into her Attorney Client Trust Account and that the money sits there at her Client's request. The Court stated that it will allow, but not approve. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission. Ms. Baer stated that she was hoping to record the deed today and that the fees have not been paid.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Continued To Dec-31-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Off Calendar
